h1s: Soluções Jurídicas na sua língua, com quem entende você
Imigração, Civil, Trabalho, Família, Criminal e mais. Advocacia especializada com quem entende sua jornada e fala sua língua.
h2s: Divórcio, guarda, pensão e outras questões familiares.
Imóveis & Transações
Venda, compra, aluguel, registro e mais.
Direito Empresarial/Comercial
Abertura de empresas, contratos, assessoria em transações, compliance e M&A.
Testamentos e Herança
Planejamento sucessório, contestação de testamentos, disputas e pedidos de apoio a dependentes.
Direito Civil
Contratos, disputas, litígios em geral, Landlord & Tenant e Small Claims.
Imigração
Vistos, residência permanente, cidadania e recusas.

pageAudit.metaDescription: Transnational Expertise. Multicultural Empathy Discover the story behind Sakuraba Law and our mission to serve the Brazilian community in Canada. Book Your
h2s: Meet Our Team

Manuela Dias is a Law Clerk at Celso Sakuraba, Barrister and Solicitor, where she supports a wide range of legal matters with diligence and a client-focused approach. She began her legal career in Brazil, after earning her Bachelor of Laws (LL.B.) from Universidade de Fortaleza. Manuela initially practiced as a licensed lawyer in consumer law, with a particular emphasis on health-related litigation. She later served as a Judicial Law Clerk at the Court of Appeal of Ceará, gaining in-depth experience in private law and judicial reasoning. Now based in Toronto, she brings a solid international perspective and a strong legal foundation to the firm.
Sakuraba Law The legal bridge between Brazil and Canada

h1s: A Ponte Jurídica Entre Dois Mundos
h2s: Conheça Nossa Equipe

Manuela Dias is a Law Clerk at Celso Sakuraba, Barrister and Solicitor, where she supports a wide range of legal matters with diligence and a client-focused approach. She began her legal career in Brazil, after earning her Bachelor of Laws (LL.B.) from Universidade de Fortaleza. Manuela initially practiced as a licensed lawyer in consumer law, with a particular emphasis on health-related litigation. She later served as a Judicial Law Clerk at the Court of Appeal of Ceará, gaining in-depth experience in private law and judicial reasoning. Now based in Toronto, she brings a solid international perspective and a strong legal foundation to the firm.
Sakuraba Law A ponte jurídica entre Brasil e Canadá
